task: Take out one Hanoi block and throw it aside
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red Hanoi block is on a light blue surface. A red cup is on the right. The red Hanoi block is a small, cube-shaped object with a red color. STRATEGY - First, reach for the red Hanoi block to grasp it. Then, transport it to a new location (the red cup) and place it inside. Failure modes include not grasping the block, dropping it during transport, or placing it outside the cup. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the block at its body. Step 2: Grasp the block at its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the block to the cup. Step 4: Place the block inside the cup.
Goal: inside(red_hanoi_block, red_cup)
Scene: red_hanoi_block, red_cup, light_blue_surface
Step 1: reach(red_hanoi_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the red Hanoi block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_hanoi_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_hanoi_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_hanoi_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the red Hanoi block
  contact: holding(red_hanoi_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_hanoi_block)
Step 3: transport(red_hanoi_block -> red_cup)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the red cup
  spatial: above(red_hanoi_block, red_cup, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_hanoi_block)
  done_when: above(red_hanoi_block, red_cup, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_hanoi_block -> red_cup)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the red cup
  contact: surface_contact(red_hanoi_block, red_cup) [completion]; released(red_hanoi_block) [completion]
  pose: inside(red_hanoi_block, red_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_hanoi_block, red_cup) AND released(red_hanoi_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red Hanoi block
the body of the red Hanoi block
an empty area inside the red cup
an empty area inside the red cup
